# John Bentley Architectural Photography

> Premium architectural and real estate photography studio based in Vancouver, BC. Cinematic, high-contrast imagery for builders, developers, realtors, architects, and interior designers across Greater Vancouver and the Fraser Valley.

John Bentley is a Vancouver-based photographer with 20+ years of experience photographing built environments. Work spans residential listings, commercial and architectural interiors, exteriors and aerial photography, and editorial-style detail studies. The studio also offers a small set of marketing support services (website generation, CRM integration, content production, process automation) intended for real-estate and design-industry clients.

## Studio

- [Home](https://www.johnbentley.ca/): Overview, hero portfolio, client list, and selected work.
- [About](https://www.johnbentley.ca/about.html): John's background, philosophy, and studio approach.
- [Services](https://www.johnbentley.ca/services.html): Three photography disciplines (Residential, Commercial, Exteriors), the booking-to-delivery process, and Marketing Support Services.
- [Contact](https://www.johnbentley.ca/contact.html): Email, phone, studio address, service area, and a project inquiry form.

## Portfolio

- [Residential Gallery](https://www.johnbentley.ca/residential.html): MLS listings, luxury estates, presale suites, twilight sessions.
- [Commercial Gallery](https://www.johnbentley.ca/commercial.html): Office, retail, hospitality, industrial, and new-development marketing.
- [Exteriors Gallery](https://www.johnbentley.ca/exteriors.html): Architectural exteriors, aerial and drone, dusk and twilight, neighbourhood context.
- [Detail Gallery](https://www.johnbentley.ca/detail.html): Material, finishes, light studies, and craftsmanship close-ups.

## Service Area

Vancouver, BC and the Greater Metro Area, including the North Shore, Burnaby, Richmond, Surrey, Coquitlam, the Tri-Cities, and the Fraser Valley.

## Contact

- Email: info@johnbentley.ca
- Phone: 604.765.1843
- Studio: 2538 W 1st Ave, Vancouver, BC V6K 1G7, Canada
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/johnbentley.ca

- [Sitemap](https://www.johnbentley.ca/sitemap.xml): Full URL list with image references.
